summary: Tested pill-shaped UI overhaul across all modules. All input fields and buttons confirmed pill-shaped (border-radius: 9999px) via computed CSS checks and visual screenshots. Functional login test passed. Create Customer and Edit Customer dialogs verified working.

gateway_page.visual: Clean pill-shaped input with full-width rounded-full button

create_customer_dialog.select_content: PASS - border-radius: 16px (rounded-2xl as specified in select.jsx)

edit_customer_dialog.all_inputs: PASS - all 8 inputs have border-radius: 9999px (flex h-11 w-full rounded-full border border-input)

forgot_password_page.visual: Clean pill-shaped input with full-width rounded-full button

critical_code_review_comments: All pill-shape implementations are consistent: Gateway/Login use .auth-input and .btn-primary CSS classes (9999px), shadcn Input/Button base components use rounded-full, UniversalFormRenderer/AddressFieldRenderer use inline pillInput() utility (h-12 rounded-full), shadcn Select trigger uses rounded-full, SelectContent uses rounded-2xl (16px). Implementation is cohesive.
Note: Early Logs button test using text-content selector ('Logs') returned a false 8px radius — re-verified with data-testid selector showing correct 9999px. No actual bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full pill-UI overhaul is complete and verified. All inputs (gateway, login, forgot password, create customer, edit customer, address fields) and all buttons (primary CTAs, admin action buttons Edit/Notes/Logs/Deactivate, dialog save/submit) are confirmed pill-shaped (border-radius: 9999px). Select triggers are rounded-full, SelectContent is rounded-2xl. No regressions found.
